published_prior_art.cite: MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased — Section 3 already defines the exact-time illness-death intervention by suppressing the 01 hazard before the imposed time and derives its nonregular risk target.
KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE — Hölder point-target regularity is standard minimax substrate.
MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased — fixed-window illness-death interventions, albeit with a distinct truncated-natural window.
MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased — EIF and cross-fitted one-step inference for its smoothed illness-death intervention.

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_dose_response_minimax — fixed-dose Hölder local-bump minimax converse.

published_prior_art.cite: ColangeloLee2023ContinuousDML; MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased — localized cross-fitted continuous-treatment and fixed-window illness-death inference.

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_dose_response_minimax — pointwise Hölder two-point lower floor.

published_prior_art.cite: KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024MinimaxCATE; BonviniKennedy2022FastDRF — local causal minimax and dose-response-rate machinery.
ArmstrongKolesar2020HonestCI — worst-case-bias honest intervals at a point.
ChernozhukovChetverikovKato2014Gaussian gives sufficient coupling conditions, not a necessary-and-sufficient delayed-entry survival-score frontier.

novelty_flags.label: prop:g-formula
novelty_flags.one_line: The exact-time intervention construction with the natural initiation hazard suppressed before the imposed time is already a stated target in MartinussenKnudsenRytgaard2026Debiased, Section 3; retain it only as corrected substrate.

novelty_flags.label: oeq:primitive-gaussian-frontier
novelty_flags.one_line: The question asks qualitatively which violations destroy coupling, but defines no frontier, threshold, or other single mathematical object to characterize.

soundness_flags.label: ass:consistency
soundness_flags.one_line: For a continuous initiation time, the event {U=u} has probability zero for each u, so the displayed condition is vacuous and is not the standard consistency condition cited.

soundness_flags.label: prop:g-formula and target_estimand
soundness_flags.one_line: No condition requires u_star+delta<=t_0: for u>t_0 the displayed product integrates the treated hazard backward and is not P_full(T^u<=t_0); use a casewise formula or restrict the window below t_0.

soundness_flags.label: prop:constant-response-reduction
soundness_flags.one_line: B_n(c)=L b_n(c)^s mu_{K,s} remains strictly positive for the declared L,b_n(c),K even when g_P is locally constant; only the actual bias is zero.

soundness_flags.label: def:variance-process and oeq:gaussian
soundness_flags.one_line: M_up permits deterministic terminal-event laws, hence v_{P,b}(c) and the empirical score variance can be zero despite being declared positive and used in denominators; impose a variance nondegeneracy condition or restrict the inference class.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: honest_scope: fixed interior Hölder/CAR regime
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Known s and L, one initiation, CAR, bounded hazards, local positivity, and an interior target are accepted as conditional model restrictions.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Any repaired minimax or inference claim is conditional on this fixed interior Hölder illness-death regime; adaptation and general multistate claims are outside the headline.

source_verification_receipts.verified_claim: The paper defines causal interventions by modifying illness-death intensities, sets the initiation intensity to zero before an exact treatment time, states that the exact-time estimand is non-pathwise differentiable, and derives an EIF plus one-step estimator only after window smoothing. It does not use the proposed null-event potential-outcome consistency display.
The paper derives minimax rates for Hölder-smooth heterogeneous causal effect estimation and analyzes rate-optimal estimation.
The article develops kernel-localized doubly robust cross-fitted inference for continuous-treatment dose-response and partial-effect functionals under nuisance conditions.
The paper derives EIFs, minimax lower bounds, and concentration-dependent rates for continuous-exposure incremental interventions, including effective-sample-size scaling.
The paper studies global and local dose-response estimators, higher-order influence-function estimators, and smoothness-sensitive risk bounds.
The paper gives a cross-fitted doubly robust estimator of baseline treatment-specific survival curves with pointwise and uniform-in-time asymptotic linearity under nuisance conditions.
The paper provides Gaussian approximation and coupling tools for suprema of empirical processes under explicit envelope and complexity conditions.
The article constructs worst-case-bias-aware honest intervals for scalar nonparametric point targets and derives efficiency and bandwidth results.
The paper develops weighted local-linear continuous-treatment estimation with a uniform Bahadur representation and bootstrap confidence bands.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Repair the causal target first: require u_star+delta<=t_0 or give the u>t_0 untreated-risk branch, then prove the corrected deterministic and stochastic intervention reductions.
Replace the null-event consistency display by a valid longitudinal consistency condition, or make the observed-intensity causal-validity assumption do all causal work and state that explicitly.
Change the constant-response sanity result to |theta_b-theta|=0 while retaining B_n as a conservative envelope, or define a response-adaptive local radius that is zero in the constant subclass.
Restrict Gaussian and CI questions to an explicitly positive-variance class and add the nuisance-rate/product conditions required for remainders to be o_P(s_{P,n}).

Turn the primitive Gaussian question into a named computable failure frontier, for example a smallest admissible effective-count/entropy/variance boundary with explicit necessity and sufficiency claims.

recommended_next_step: Rebuild the load-bearing target, consistency condition, and bias sanity reduction before re-entering Stage -0.5; only then reassess the field-tier exact-time minimax kernel.
